revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no ja/en source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == <!-- No source talk page found on ja/en Wikipedia at migration time. -->
<!-- Dummy comment to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page. -->

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Age of the Gods); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Age of the Gods); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204584229 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Age of the Gods); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204584229 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Age of the Gods); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204584229 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Age of the Gods); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:29, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204584229 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:29, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:29, 25 February 2026 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:29, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Age of the Gods); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:29, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204584229 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Age_of_the_Gods here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:29, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204584229 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Age_of_the_Gods here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:29, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1204584229 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|myth=yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == Amaterasu == In the article it says that Amaterasu was born of the womb of Izanami. It then says that "later" more deities were born of her womb until the fire god. However, Amaterasu was not born of Izanami's womb. After Izanami died giving birth to the fire god Kagutsuchi, she descended into Yomi (Hades). When Izanagi went there to find her, she existed as a rotting corpse which disgusted Izanagi and caused him to flee out of Yomi and thus be cursed by Izanami in her anger at the betrayal by Izanagi. After fleeing from Yomi, Izanagi washed himself to purify himself from the filth of Yomi. When he washed, three god were born from him through his washing. Amaterasu was one of those three deities and was born from Izanagi's left eye. Therefore the article is incorrect when it says that Amaterasu was born from Izanami's womb. — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Todd Gorman|Todd Gorman]] ([[User talk:Todd Gorman|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Todd Gorman|contribs]]) 06:27, 15 January 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) =="Age of the Gods"== Aren't there other "Age of the Gods" in other cultures, and in modern fiction? [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 06:12, 4 February 2011 (UTC) :If more come up, then we can disambiguate. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 16:55, 4 February 2011 (UTC) ::A simple search [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3ASearch&redirs=0&search=age+of+the+gods&fulltext=Search&ns0=1] shows there's one for Greek Mythology (the age after the Age of the Titans), one for Egyptian Mythology, one for Norse Mythology, etc... [[Special:Contributions/64.229.101.119|64.229.101.119]] ([[User talk:64.229.101.119|talk]]) 04:04, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :::Do we have articles for them here? If not, then there is no need to disambiguate. If so, then we can certainly do so. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Installing Japanese character sets|?]] · [[Special:Contributions/Nihonjoe|投稿]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] · [[WP:JA|Join WikiProject Japan]]! 05:44, 5 February 2011 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC)
